channel.title: Case Studies on Marijan Batarilo
channel.description: Recent content in Case Studies on Marijan Batarilo

item.title: Clipster: From MVP on a Single Server to 100 Billion Views
item.description: Backend rewrite from a single-server Svelte MVP to Go + GCP + PostgreSQL - creator payouts, OAuth RFCs, and scale.

item.title: CircuitMess Subscription API: Killing Duplicate Shipments with a Centralized Order Brain
item.description: Greenfield Node.js + GCP + MySQL subscription API that ended 100+ duplicate shipments for a Forbes-featured STEM toy company.

item.title: CADENAS: Three and a Half Years Learning to Be a Software Engineer
item.description: Where two years of self-taught programming became a career - domain depth, automation instincts, and the cost of the wrong CMS decision.
